Name: Agile
Description: Agile weapons are unusually well balanced and responsive. A wielder with the Weapon Finesse feat can choose to apply her Dexterity modifier to damage rolls with an agile weapon in place of her Strength modifier (whichever is higher). This modifier to damage is not increased for two-handed weapons, but is still reduced for off-hand weapons.

Name: Anarchic
Description: An anarchic weapon is infused with the power of chaos. It makes the weapon chaotically aligned and thus bypasses the corresponding damage reduction. It deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against all creatures of lawful alignment.

Name: ArcaneArmorShadowEnchant
Description: This armor blurs the wearer whenever they try to hide, while also dampening the sound around them, granting a +5 competence bonus on Stealth skill checks. The armor's armor check penalty still applies normally.

Name: ArmorEnhancementBonus1
Description: This armor provides a +1 enhancement bonus to Armor Class. The armor check penalty of magic armor is lessened by 1 compared to ordinary armor of its type.

Name: ArrowDeflectionEnchantment
Description: This shield protects the wielder as if they had the Deflect Arrows feat.

Name: Axiomatic
Description: An axiomatic weapon is infused with lawful power. It makes the weapon law-aligned and thus bypasses the corresponding damage reduction. It deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against chaotic creatures.

Name: BaneAberration
Description: A bane weapon excels against certain foes. Against a designated foe, the weapon's enhancement bonus is +2 better than its actual bonus. It also deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against such foes.

Name: BaneAnimal
Description: A bane weapon excels against certain foes. Against a designated foe, the weapon's enhancement bonus is +2 better than its actual bonus. It also deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against such foes.

Description: A bane weapon excels against certain foes. Against a designated foe, the weapon's enhancement bonus is +2 better than its actual bonus. It also deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against such foes.

Description: A bane weapon excels against certain foes. Against a designated foe, the weapon's enhancement bonus is +2 better than its actual bonus. It also deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against such foes.

Description: A bane weapon excels against certain foes. Against a designated foe, the weapon's enhancement bonus is +2 better than its actual bonus. It also deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against such foes.

Description: A bane weapon excels against certain foes. Against a designated foe, the weapon's enhancement bonus is +2 better than its actual bonus. It also deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against such foes.

Description: A bane weapon excels against certain foes. Against a designated foe, the weapon's enhancement bonus is +2 better than its actual bonus. It also deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against such foes.

Description: A bane weapon excels against certain foes. Against a designated foe, the weapon's enhancement bonus is +2 better than its actual bonus. It also deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against such foes.

Description: A bane weapon excels against certain foes. Against a designated foe, the weapon's enhancement bonus is +2 better than its actual bonus. It also deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against such foes.

Description: A bane weapon excels against certain foes. Against a designated foe, the weapon's enhancement bonus is +2 better than its actual bonus. It also deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against such foes.

Name: BaneOutsiderGood
Description: A bane weapon excels against certain foes. Against a designated foe, the weapon's enhancement bonus is +2 better than its actual bonus. It also deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against such foes.

Name: BaneOutsiderLawful
Description: A bane weapon excels against certain foes. Against a designated foe, the weapon's enhancement bonus is +2 better than its actual bonus. It also deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against such foes.

Name: BaneOutsiderNeutral
Description: A bane weapon excels against certain foes. Against a designated foe, the weapon's enhancement bonus is +2 better than its actual bonus. It also deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against such foes.

Name: BanePlant
Description: A bane weapon excels against certain foes. Against a designated foe, the weapon's enhancement bonus is +2 better than its actual bonus. It also deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against such foes.

Name: BaneUndead
Description: A bane weapon excels against certain foes. Against a designated foe, the weapon's enhancement bonus is +2 better than its actual bonus. It also deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against such foes.

Name: BaneVermin
Description: A bane weapon excels against certain foes. Against a designated foe, the weapon's enhancement bonus is +2 better than its actual bonus. It also deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against such foes.

Name: Bleed
Description: Whenever a bleed weapon lands a hit, it makes the target bleed for 1d6 HP per round. Bleed will continue until the target receives magic healing or leaves combat.

Name: BrilliantEnergy
Description: A brilliant energy weapon ignores nonliving matter. Armor and shield bonuses to AC (including any enhancement bonuses to that armor) do not count against it because the weapon passes through armor. (Dexterity, deflection, dodge, natural armor, and other such bonuses still apply.) A brilliant energy weapon cannot harm undead, constructs, or objects.

Name: Corrosive
Description: Corrosive weapon deals an extra 1d6 points of acid damage on a successful hit.

Name: Corrosive2d6
Description: Caustic weapon deals an extra 2d6 points of acid damage on a successful hit.

Name: CorrosiveBurst
Description: A corrosive burst weapon functions as a corrosive weapon that also explodes with acid upon striking a successful critical hit. The acid does not harm the wielder. In addition to the extra 1d6 acid damage from the corrosive ability, a corrosive burst weapon deals an extra 1d10 points of acid damage on a successful critical hit. If the weapon's critical multiplier is ×3, add an extra 2d10 points of acid damage instead, and if the multiplier is ×4, add an extra 3d10 points of acid damage.

Name: CruelEnchantment
Description: When the wielder strikes a creature that is frightened or shaken with a cruel weapon, that creature becomes sickened for 1 round. When the wielder uses the weapon to knock unconscious or kill a creature, he gains 5 temporary hit points that last for 10 minutes.

Name: DisruptingWeapon
Description: A disruption weapon is the bane of all undead. Any undead creature struck in combat must succeed on a DC 14 Will save or be destroyed. A disruption weapon must be a bludgeoning melee weapon.

Name: Disruption
Description: A disruption weapon is the bane of all undead. Any undead creature struck in combat must succeed on a DC 14 Will save or be destroyed. A disruption weapon must be a bludgeoning melee weapon.

Name: DragonEssenceBaneDragon
Description: A bane weapon excels against certain foes. Against a designated foe, the weapon's enhancement bonus is +2 better than its actual bonus. It also deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against such foes.

Name: Enhancement1
Description: Attacks with this weapon get +1 enhancement bonus on both attack and damage rolls.

Name: EvilAligned
Description: An evil-aligned weapon can bypass the DR of certain creatures.

Name: Flaming
Description: Flaming weapon is sheathed in fire that deals an extra 1d6 points of fire damage on a successful hit.

Name: FlamingBurst
Description: A flaming burst weapon functions as a flaming weapon that also explodes with flame upon striking a successful critical hit. The fire does not harm the wielder. In addition to the extra 1d6 fire damage from the flaming ability, a flaming burst weapon deals an extra 1d10 points of fire damage on a successful critical hit. If the weapon's critical multiplier is ×3, add an extra 2d10 points of fire damage instead, and if the multiplier is ×4, add an extra 3d10 points of fire damage.

Name: Fortification25Enchant
Description: This suit of armor or shield produces a magical force that protects vital areas of the wearer more effectively. When an enemy confirms a critical hit or lands a sneak attack against the wearer, there is a chance that the critical hit or sneak attack is negated and damage is instead rolled normally. The chance is 25% for light fortification, 50% for moderate fortification, and 75% for heavy fortification.

Name: Fortification50Enchant
Description: This suit of armor or shield produces a magical force that protects vital areas of the wearer more effectively. When an enemy confirms a critical hit or lands a sneak attack against the wearer, there is a chance that the critical hit or sneak attack is negated and damage is instead rolled normally. The chance is 25% for light fortification, 50% for moderate fortification, and 75% for heavy fortification.

Name: Fortification75Enchant
Description: This suit of armor or shield produces a magical force that protects vital areas of the wearer more effectively. When an enemy confirms a critical hit or lands a sneak attack against the wearer, there is a chance that the critical hit or sneak attack is negated and damage is instead rolled normally. The chance is 25% for light fortification, 50% for moderate fortification, and 75% for heavy fortification.

Name: Frost
Description: Frost weapon is sheathed in a terrible, icy cold that deals an extra 1d6 points of cold damage on a successful hit.

Name: Furious
Description: A furious weapon serves as a focus for its wielder's anger. When the wielder is raging or under the effect of a rage spell, the weapon's enhancement bonus is +2 better than normal.

Name: Furyborn
Description: This special ability can only be placed on melee weapons. A furyborn weapon draws power from the anger and frustration the wielder feels when battling foes that refuse to die. Each time the wielder damages an opponent with the weapon, its enhancement bonus increases by +1 when making attacks against that opponent. Enhancement bonus can't be increased this way beyond the maximum value of +5. This extra enhancement bonus goes away if the opponent dies, the wielder uses the weapon to attack a different creature, or 1 hour passes.

Name: GhostTouch
Description: A ghost touch weapon deals damage normally against incorporeal creatures, regardless of its bonus. An incorporeal creature's 50% reduction in damage from corporeal sources does not apply to attacks made against it with ghost touch weapons.

Name: GreaterShadow
Description: This armor grants its wearer a +10 competence bonus to Stealth skill checks.

Name: Heartseeker
Description: A heartseeker weapon ignores the miss chance for concealment against most living targets, though the attack must still target the proper space. This special ability does not apply against aberrations, oozes, plants, outsiders with the elemental subtype, or any creature specifically noted to lack a heart.

Name: Holy
Description: A holy weapon is imbued with holy power. This power makes the weapon good-aligned and thus bypasses the corresponding damage reduction. It deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against all creatures of evil alignment.

Name: IcyBurst
Description: An icy burst weapon functions as a frost weapon that also explodes with frost upon striking a successful critical hit. The frost does not harm the wielder. In addition to the extra damage from the frost ability, an icy burst weapon deals an extra 1d10 points of cold damage on a successful critical hit. If the weapon's critical multiplier is ×3, add an extra 2d10 points of cold damage instead, and if the multiplier is ×4, add an extra 3d10 points.

Name: IgnitingEnchantment
Description: An igniting weapon functions as a flaming weapon that also causes the target to catch fire upon striking it with a successful critical hit. The target have to pass Fortitude saving throw (DC 20) or suffer 1d6 fire damage each round and can make a save each round on its turn to put out the fire.

Name: Keen
Description: Ability doubles the threat range of a weapon. This benefit doesn't stack with any other effects that expand the threat range of a weapon.

Name: LawfulAligned
Description: A lawful-aligned weapon can bypass the DR of certain creatures.

Name: Masterwork
Description: A masterwork weapon is a finely crafted version of a normal weapon. Wielding it provides a +1 enhancement bonus on attack rolls.

Name: NullifyingEnchantment
Description: This special ability can only be placed on melee weapons. A nullifying weapon suppresses a creature's spell resistance for a short amount of time. Anytime the weapon strikes a creature with spell resistance, the target's spell resistance is reduced by 1 for 1 minute. On a confirmed critical hit, its spell resistance is instead reduced by 2. Multiple hits from a nullifying weapon stack.

Name: Radiant
Description: Radiant weapon is imbued with life essence itself and deals an extra 1d6 points of positive energy damage on a successful hit.

Name: ShadowArmor
Description: This armor grants its wearer a +5 competence bonus to Stealth skill checks.

Name: ShieldEnhancementBonus1
Description: Grants +1 enhancement bonus to Armor Class. The armor check penalty of magic shield is lessened by 1 compared to ordinary shield of its type.

Name: ShieldEnhancementBonus3
Description: Grants +3 enhancement bonus to Armor Class. The armor check penalty of magic shield is lessened by 1 compared to ordinary shield of its type.

Name: Shock
Description: Shock weapon is sheathed in crackling electricity that deals an extra 1d6 points of electricity damage on a successful hit.

Name: ShockingBurst
Description: A shocking burst weapon functions as a shock weapon that explodes with electricity upon striking a successful critical hit. The electricity does not harm the wielder. In addition to the extra electricity damage from the shock ability, a shocking burst weapon deals an extra 1d10 points of electricity damage on a successful critical hit. If the weapon's critical multiplier is ×3, add an extra 2d10 points of electricity damage instead, and if the multiplier is ×4, add an extra 3d10 points.

Name: SingingSteelEnchant
Description: This lustrous golden metal emits beautiful bell-like tones when struck. An alloy of gold and mithral, singing steel was originally created by the elves. Most armor made of singing steel is treated as one category lighter (heavy armors are treated as medium, and medium armors are treated as light, but light armors are still treated as light). The armor or shield's arcane spell failure chance is reduced by 5%, its maximum Dexterity bonus is increased by 1, and its armor check penalty is reduced by 1 (to a minimum of 0). The wielder or wearer can strike the singing steel as part of beginning a bardic performance. If the wielder can normally start a bardic performance as a standard action, he can do so as a move action instead. If the wielder can normally start a bardic performance as a move action, he can do so as a swift action instead. If the wielder can normally start a bardic performance as a swift action, he can do so as a free action instead.

Name: Speed
Description: When making a full attack, the wielder of a speed weapon may make one extra attack with it. The attack uses the wielder's full base attack bonus, plus any modifiers appropriate to the situation. (This benefit is not cumulative with similar effects, such as a haste spell.)

Name: StrengthComposite
Description: This feature allows you to add your Strength bonus to damage with a bow.

Name: Thundering
Description: A thundering weapon creates a cacophonous roar like thunder whenever it strikes a target, dealing an extra 1d6 points of sonic damage.

Name: Unholy
Description: An unholy weapon is imbued with unholy power. This power makes the weapon evil-aligned and thus bypasses the corresponding damage reduction. It deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against all creatures of good alignment.

Name: ViciousEnchantment
Description: When a vicious weapon strikes an opponent, it creates a flash of disruptive energy that resonates between the opponent and the wielder. This energy deals an extra 2d6 points of damage to the opponent and 1d6 points of damage to the wielder.

Name: Vorpal
Description: This potent and feared ability allows the weapon to sever the heads of those it strikes. Upon a roll of natural 20 (followed by a successful roll to confirm the critical hit), the weapon severs the opponent's head (if it has one) from its body. Some creatures, such as many aberrations and all oozes, have no heads. Others, such as golems and undead creatures other than vampires, are not affected by the loss of their heads. Most other creatures, however, die when their heads are cut off.

Name: WeaponBondFlamingBurstEnchant
Description: A flaming burst weapon functions as a flaming weapon that also explodes with flame upon striking a successful critical hit. The fire does not harm the wielder. In addition to the extra 1d6 fire damage from the flaming ability, a flaming burst weapon deals an extra 1d10 points of fire damage on a successful critical hit. If the weapon's critical multiplier is ×3, add an extra 2d10 points of fire damage instead, and if the multiplier is ×4, add an extra 3d10 points of fire damage.
